items.title: "I don't think we have a connection, but I really like how you think, and how smart you are, so I want us to be friends. Perhaps you can help me find a good man?"
items.author: Morten Stig Jensen
items.body_excerpt:
"I don't think we have a connection, but I really like how you think, and how smart you are, so I want us to be friends. Perhaps you can help me find a good man?"

Oh, sure. Totally. Want my first-born too? Should I devote just a part of my day to this endeavor, or is it a full-time position?

😅🙄
